creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #3)
> It appears I have bug 78787 applied and <time.h> part is causing the issue.

Uh, how do you draw that conclusion?


>   lang/clang33        - unaffected
>   clang 3.3 in base   - unaffacted
>   clang 3.4.1 in base - unaffected
>   lang/clang34        - unaffected
>   lang/clang35        - affected
>   clang350-import     - affected
>   lang/clang-devel    - affected
>   lang/gcc49          - unaffected
> 
>   lang/perl5.16       - affected
>   lang/perl5.18       - affected
>   lang/perl5.20       - affected
> 
>   CFLAGS += -O0       - affected
>   patched poudriere jail - affected
> 
> likely by the following snippet
> 
> #ifdef CLK_TCK
>         {
>             IV temp0;
>             temp0 = CLK_TCK;
> 	    constant_add_symbol(aTHX_  symbol_table, "CLK_TCK",
> 				    7, newSViv(temp0));
>         }
> #endif

And how do you end up thinking that this is the cause?  Is there any explanation beyond this? :-)
